reason: The node does not address complete reducibility explicitly. For the decomposition pi_phi = oplus sigma_j^{oplus n_j} to exist, the representation pi_phi must be completely reducible (i.e., every closed invariant subspace has an invariant complement). This is guaranteed because the commutant pi_phi(A)' is a finite-dimensional von Neumann algebra, hence contains enough projections to decompose the Hilbert space. Specifically, the minimal projections in each block M_{n_j}(C) give the irreducible subrepresentations. This should be stated or at least acknowledged, since for general *-algebra representations complete reducibility is not automatic.
